title: Better Combat x Cataclysm Spellbooks Compatibility
description: For the people who want compatibility with Cataclysm Spellbooks and Better Combat
body:
A datapack that adds Better Combat functionality to certain Cataclysm Spellbooks weapons, to go with Iron's Spells n' Spellbooks' built-in compatibility with Better Combat.

- All staffs except the Soul Brazier and Fake Wadjet's Staff uses the same attack pattern as the Artificier's Cane from Iron's Spells n' Spellbooks
- Soul Brazier and Fake Wadjet's Staff use a one-handed spear attack pattern
- Hellfire Forge uses the hammer attack pattern
- Monstrous Flamberge uses the same attack pattern as the other Flamberges from Iron's Spells n' Spellbooks (Claymore)

Better Combat:
https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat

Cataclysm:
https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm

Iron's Spells n' Spellbooks:
https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks

Cataclysm Spellbooks:
https://modrinth.com/mod/cataclysm-spellbooks
